description_long: This object consists of two stacked hardcover books bound together by a wide brown leather strap. The top book has a dark, almost black cover with a subtle textured pattern, while the bottom book is slightly larger and features a dark brown cover with a smooth finish. The spines of both books are visible, with the top book's spine showing gold bands and a marbled texture. The pages are white and tightly bound, with a slight sheen visible along the edges. The leather strap is thick and wraps securely around the center, adding a rugged, utilitarian appearance. No visible illustrations or text are present on the covers, giving the books a classic and understated look.
description: Two stacked hardcover books bound by a wide brown leather strap, featuring dark covers and white pages with a classic, unadorned appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white page edges of both books and the brown leather strap running across the top.
description_view_1: Spine view highlighting the marbled texture and gold bands on the top book's spine, with the strap running vertically.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the clean white page edges and the strap, similar to view 0 but from the other side.
description_view_3: Front view showing the full width of the books, the brown strap centered, and the plain dark covers.
attribute_spine_design: The top book's spine is marbled black with gold bands, while the bottom book's spine is plain dark brown. No text or decorative elements are visible.
